items.claim: Luke Riley has no grappling upside.
items.quote: I think he has no grappling upside.
he has the wrestling upside here.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt's current fighting style involves running away and avoiding engagement.
items.quote: He's running away. He's doing absolutely nothing.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt has a chinny durability profile.
Nikita Krylov is washed and chinny.
items.quote: Krylov's a guy that's I think is a little bit washed at this point, a little bit chinny at this point.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is less washed than Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: Whittaker, I think although older, I think he's the less washed far fighter out of the two

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has no business competing at light heavyweight.
items.quote: Robert Whittaker has no business at light heavyweight at all.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has a grappling advantage over Robert Whittaker.
items.quote: He's going to have the grappling advantage.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker has always been chinny.
items.quote: Whittaker's always been a little bit chinny

items.claim: Terrance McKinney's performance is binary: he either gets an early finish or gets broken and finished late in the first round.
items.quote: McKinney's either going to go out there and win the fight in the first 2 minutes and 30 seconds. If he does, he does. If he doesn't, he's going to get finished.

items.claim: Royval's chin is suspect due to accumulated damage.
items.quote: I think the chin of Royval is a little bit suspect at this point. He's taken a lot of damage.

items.claim: Royval has a cardio advantage over Ronnie Kavanaugh.
items.quote: Royval um has the cardio advantage

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis has a 100% finish rate.
Benoit Saint Denis leaves openings on the mat and feet that Paddy Pimblett can exploit.
items.quote: Saint Denis leaves a lot of openings on the mat, on the feet, stuff like that.
